schemaVersion.description: The scene document schema version this document was authored against.

id.description: Unique identifier for this composition within the project.

fps.description: Frames per second this composition runs at.

durationInFrames.description: Total integer length of this composition, in frames.

width.description: Output width of this composition, in pixels.

height.description: Output height of this composition, in pixels.

id.description: Unique identifier for this track within the project.

name.description: Optional human-readable label, purely for authoring and debugging.

id.description: Unique identifier for this clip within the project.

startFrame.description: The frame, relative to the start of its composition, this clip begins on.

durationInFrames.description: How many frames this clip is visible for.

node.description: The root of the scene-node subtree this clip contributes.

transitionIn.description: Optional transition this clip blends in with. Omitted means an instant cut.

type.description: Which kind of transition this is. 'cut' is the absence of a transition.

durationInFrames.description: How many frames the transition takes to complete, once the incoming clip starts.

direction.description: Which edge a 'wipe' sweeps in from. Only meaningful (and only allowed) for type: 'wipe'.

clips.description: The ordered clips placed on this track.

tracks.description: The tracks of clips that populate this composition.

activeCameraTrack.description: Optional lane naming which camera is active at each frame, independent of tracks.

startFrame.description: The frame, relative to the start of the composition, this entry begins on.

durationInFrames.description: How many frames this entry's camera stays active for.

cameraNodeId.description: Id of the CameraNode active for this window, resolved elsewhere in the scene graph.

audioTracks.description: Optional lanes of audio content, independent of tracks.

id.description: Unique identifier for this track within the project.

name.description: Optional human-readable label, purely for authoring and debugging.

id.description: Unique identifier for this clip within the project.

startFrame.description: The frame, relative to the start of its composition, this clip begins on.

durationInFrames.description: How many frames this clip plays for.

assetRef.description: Identifies the source audio asset this clip plays.

trimStartFrames.description: How many frames into the source audio playback begins. Defaults to 0.

gain.description: Linear gain multiplier applied to the source audio. Defaults to 1.

fadeIn.description: Optional ramp from silence up to gain at the start of this clip's window.

durationInFrames.description: How many frames this fade ramp takes to complete.

fadeOut.description: Optional ramp from gain down to silence at the end of this clip's window.

durationInFrames.description: How many frames this fade ramp takes to complete.

clips.description: The ordered audio clips placed on this track.

compositions.description: The named compositions that make up this project.

project.description: The full project this document describes.

kind.description: Discriminant identifying this node as a group.

name.description: Optional human-readable label, purely for authoring and debugging.

The z component of the vector.

anyOf.description: A 3-component numeric tuple, typically a world-space position or axis.

frame.description: The integer frame this keyframe's value applies at.

color.description: The color to render the text in. A plain ColorRGBA or a keyframe track.

extrudeDepth.description: How far to extrude each glyph along its own local Z axis, in fontSize units. Omitted or 0 renders flat MSDF quads; a positive value builds solid 3D glyph geometry instead. A plain number or a keyframe track.

type.description: Discriminant identifying this value as a keyframe track.

frame.description: The integer frame this keyframe's value applies at.

easing.description: How this keyframe blends into the next one. Defaults to 'linear'.

keyframes.description: The ordered keyframes describing how this property varies over time.

stagger.description: A deterministic per-unit staggered reveal animation across this node's own content. Omitted means no staggering.

grouping.description: Which unit a TextStaggerConfig splits the node's own content into.

startFrame.description: The frame the very first unit (in stagger order) begins revealing at.

delayFrames.description: Frames between each consecutive unit's own reveal start, in stagger order.

durationFrames.description: How many frames one unit's own reveal takes, once it starts. Ignored by "wave".

easing.description: Defaults to "linear".

distance.description: "fadeInUp" only: how far below its natural position a unit starts, in fontSize-relative em units. Defaults to 0.5.

amplitude.description: "wave" only: peak vertical offset, in fontSize-relative em units. Defaults to 0.1.

periodFrames.description: "wave" only: frames per full oscillation. Defaults to 30.

physics.description: Expressive per-glyph animation (springs, jitter, wave, scramble, count-up), composable with stagger. Omitted means no physics effect.

effect.description: Which per-glyph animation a TextPhysicsConfig drives.

grouping.description: Which unit a TextStaggerConfig splits the node's own content into.

seed.description: Seeds this effect's own deterministic randomness ("jitter"'s noise, "scramble"'s character choices). Defaults to 0.

startFrame.description: "spring"/"scramble" only: the frame the very first unit (in rank order) begins animating at. Defaults to 0.

delayFrames.description: "spring"/"scramble" only: frames between each consecutive unit's own start, in rank order. Defaults to 0 (every unit starts together).

durationFrames.description: "spring"/"scramble"/"countUp" only: how many frames one unit's own animation takes, once it starts. Defaults to 30.

fps.description: "spring" only: the composition's own frame rate, needed to convert frame counts into physical time for the mass-spring-damper simulation. Defaults to 30.

distance.description: "spring" only: how far (in fontSize-relative em units) a unit starts offset from its natural position. Defaults to 1.

positionAmplitude.description: "jitter"/"wave" only: peak offset, in fontSize-relative em units. Defaults to 0.05 for "jitter", 0.1 for "wave".

rotationAmplitude.description: "jitter" only: peak rotation around the glyph's own local Z axis, in radians. Defaults to 0 (no rotation jitter).

periodFrames.description: "jitter"'s own noise checkpoint spacing, or "wave"'s own oscillation period, in frames. Defaults to 20 for "jitter", 30 for "wave".

charset.description: "scramble" only: which characters a not-yet-locked-in unit is randomly drawn from. Defaults to uppercase Latin letters and digits.

fromValue.description: "countUp" only: the value displayed at frame <= startFrame. Defaults to 0.

toValue.description: "countUp" only: the value displayed at frame >= startFrame + durationFrames. Defaults to 0.

decimalPlaces.description: "countUp" only: fixed decimal places in the formatted number. Defaults to 0.

useGrouping.description: "countUp" only: whether to group digits with a thousands separator (always a fixed en-US-equivalent format regardless of runtime locale). Defaults to false.

easing.description: "countUp" only: eases the count's own progress. Defaults to "linear".

path.description: Places this node's own glyphs along a curve instead of a flat line. Omitted means a normal flat layout.

progress.description: How much of the curve's own remaining length (from startOffset to the curve's own end) the text's full span is stretched across. 1 (the default) uses all of it; less compresses the whole text into a shorter leading portion.

type.description: Discriminant identifying this value as a keyframe track.

frame.description: The integer frame this keyframe's value applies at.

easing.description: How this keyframe blends into the next one. Defaults to 'linear'.

keyframes.description: The ordered keyframes describing how this property varies over time.

startOffset.description: Where along the curve's own arc length (0 to 1) the text's own alignment-anchored point sits. Defaults to 0.

type.description: Discriminant identifying this value as a keyframe track.

frame.description: The integer frame this keyframe's value applies at.

easing.description: How this keyframe blends into the next one. Defaults to 'linear'.

keyframes.description: The ordered keyframes describing how this property varies over time.

morph.description: Crossfade-morphs this node's own content from another string. Omitted means no morphing: content renders as-is.

from.description: The text this node's own content crossfade-morphs from.

grouping.description: Which unit a TextStaggerConfig splits the node's own content into.

frame.description: The integer frame this keyframe's value applies at.

easing.description: How this keyframe blends into the next one. Defaults to 'linear'.

progress.description: 0 shows from exactly as laid out; 1 shows content exactly as laid out.

fill.description: A richer fill than a flat color: gradient, texture, or video. Omitted means a plain color fill (only meaningful for the flat MSDF path, not the extruded one).

anyOf.description: A straight (non-premultiplied) RGBA color. Each channel is a number in the inclusive range 0 to 1, not 0 to 255.

assetRef.description: Id of a video asset, resolved against an asset registry by the renderer. May transiently be a cadra-generation://<slotId> placeholder ref for a not-yet-finished generation job, rewritten to a real ref once that job completes.

blendMode.description: How this video layer's pixels combine with whatever renders beneath it. Defaults to 'normal'.

maskRef.description: Optional reference to a mask asset restricting which pixels of this video layer are visible. Omitted means no masking.

inFrame.description: Source-video-local frame the trimmed range starts at, inclusive. Defaults to 0.

outFrame.description: Source-video-local frame the trimmed range ends at, inclusive. Defaults to the source's own last frame.

playbackRate.description: How fast the source advances relative to composition time. Must be positive. Defaults to 1.

fitMode.description: How the source video is fitted into this node's plane when aspect ratios differ. Defaults to 'cover'.

outOfRangeBehavior.description: What happens once the clip-local frame maps past the trimmed range's natural end. Defaults to 'hold'.

layer.description: The root of this layer's own element tree, authored inline.

width.description: This layer's own fixed rendering resolution width, in layer units (what Satori lays out and resvg rasterizes at). Not a Property<number>: changing it means a full re-render, unlike transform.scale.

height.description: This layer's own fixed rendering resolution height, in layer units. See width.

type.description: Discriminant identifying this value as a keyframe track.

frame.description: The integer frame this keyframe's value applies at.

easing.description: How this keyframe blends into the next one. Defaults to 'linear'.

keyframes.description: The ordered keyframes describing how this property varies over time.

opacity.description: Opacity this layer is composited at, 0 to 1. A plain number or a keyframe track. Defaults to 1.

blendMode.description: How this layer's pixels combine with whatever renders beneath it. Defaults to 'normal'.

fonts.description: Every font layer's own styles reference by fontFamily. Omitted or empty is only valid when layer contains no text.

family.description: CSS fontFamily name this font is selected by within the layer's own styles.

fontRef.description: Id of a registered font asset, resolved against the same font registry TextNode.fontRef uses.

variationCoordinates.description: Explicit variation coordinates for this font (e.g. { wght: 700 }). Axes not mentioned default to the font's own declared default.

elementAnimations.description: Per-frame animatable overrides for individual elements within layer, keyed by each target element's own id.

opacity.description: A plain number or a keyframe track.

type.description: Discriminant identifying this value as a keyframe track.

frame.description: The integer frame this keyframe's value applies at.

easing.description: How this keyframe blends into the next one. Defaults to 'linear'.

keyframes.description: The ordered keyframes describing how this property varies over time.

x.description: Horizontal translation added on top of the element's own natural flex-resolved position. A plain number or a keyframe track.

type.description: Discriminant identifying this value as a keyframe track.

frame.description: The integer frame this keyframe's value applies at.

easing.description: How this keyframe blends into the next one. Defaults to 'linear'.

keyframes.description: The ordered keyframes describing how this property varies over time.

y.description: Vertical translation added on top of the element's own natural flex-resolved position. A plain number or a keyframe track.

type.description: Discriminant identifying this value as a keyframe track.

frame.description: The integer frame this keyframe's value applies at.

easing.description: How this keyframe blends into the next one. Defaults to 'linear'.

keyframes.description: The ordered keyframes describing how this property varies over time.

color.description: A plain ColorRGBA or a keyframe track.

prefixItems.description: The red channel, in the inclusive range 0 to 1.
The green channel, in the inclusive range 0 to 1.
The blue channel, in the inclusive range 0 to 1.
The alpha channel, in the inclusive range 0 to 1.

anyOf.description: A straight (non-premultiplied) RGBA color. Each channel is a number in the inclusive range 0 to 1, not 0 to 255.

type.description: Discriminant identifying this value as a keyframe track.

frame.description: The integer frame this keyframe's value applies at.

prefixItems.description: The red channel, in the inclusive range 0 to 1.
The green channel, in the inclusive range 0 to 1.
The blue channel, in the inclusive range 0 to 1.
The alpha channel, in the inclusive range 0 to 1.

easing.description: How this keyframe blends into the next one. Defaults to 'linear'.

keyframes.description: The ordered keyframes describing how this property varies over time.

children.description: Child scene nodes nested under this node.

id.description: Optional stable identifier, unique within one layer tree. A lookup key for a SatoriNode's own elementAnimations, not read by Satori itself at all.

type.description: Which of the four supported element kinds this layer element is.

style.description: A curated, typed subset of CSS restricted to exactly what Satori itself implements.

children.description: Text content and/or nested elements, in document order. Satori paints later siblings on top of earlier ones; there is no z-index in SVG.

src.description: img only: the image source, a data: URI (recommended) or an http(s):// URL.

icon.description: icon only: a bundled icon's name (Lucide's own kebab-case names, e.g. "arrow-right"), resolved to an image ahead of Satori ever seeing it. Recolored from style.color when set.

lang.description: BCP-47-ish language tag forcing which locale-specific font/shaping Satori uses.
